/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch x86_64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/I_HAVE_A_DREAM.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/I_HAVE_A_DREAM.dir/src/scene.cpp.o -o I_HAVE_A_DREAM  libgame_domain.a third_party/raylib/raylib/libraylib.a -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework CoreFoundation
